semantic_sweep.review_note: Reviewed the complete chapter, all eighteen bounded source mappings, both authored harness families, all nineteen Lean declarations, every manifest atom, every prose candidate, test plan, crosswalk, summary, and handoff. The sweep made evidence-gated promotion from complete repeated execution traces into qualified reusable execution structure the distinct owner; separated semantic, episodic, procedural, policy, tool, and model-learning domains; preserved artifact reality, belief support, semantic compilation, routing, effect authority, verification, readiness, human work, rights, and model-state owners; required prospective comparability, complete trace universes, failure retention, causal alternatives, typed parameters, reproducible synthesis, matched baselines, joint lifecycle metrics, scoped routing, drift monitoring, effect-complete recovery, and descendant invalidation; classified nineteen declarations as two direct predicate/projection checks and seventeen derived finite route, negative, or fixture consequences; and preserved zero core support effect.

scope.population: Natural and adversarial public-safe repeated knowledge-work, coding, analysis, data, workflow, tool-use, and simulated effect tasks that may yield reusable procedures under explicit principals, consumers, authority, rights, costs, failures, and delayed outcomes.
scope.environment: Eighteen reviewed source mappings; one public tool schema; three valid and six expected-invalid qualification packets; one four-project promotion record with ten rejecting mutations; nineteen Lean declarations; and a future natural repeated-work campaign. No deployed trace miner, causal clusterer, parameter-discovery system, tool synthesizer, natural regression campaign, router, effect-complete rollback, monitor, or retirement automation is represented.
scope.model: An evidence-gated transition relation over eligible trace universes, memory domains, receipt reality, prospective comparability, outcome retention, candidate invariants and causal alternatives, typed parameters, executable contracts, synthesis, verification, matched baselines, regression and transfer, joint metrics, lifecycle qualification, scoped routing, monitoring, recovery, and descendant invalidation.
scope.authority: Artifact Graphs owns trace reality; Context owns fact, episodic, and working memory; Claim Ledgers owns support; Cognitive Compilation owns representation; Routing owns selection; Runtime owns effects; Verification and Evidence owns adequacy and support; Benchmarks owns floors; Capability and Readiness owns promotion and release; Security, Rights, and Legal owns authority and data obligations; humans and Labor OS own review and work; Data Engines owns model-state learning. Procedural Memory owns evidence-gated promotion of reusable execution structure only.
scope.time: Semantic review current through 2026-07-14; changes to task, consumer, principal, rights, trace universe, receipt, comparability rule, source, dependency, model, tool, environment, evaluator, benchmark, policy, authority, cost, monitoring, incident, or delayed outcome expire affected qualification.
scope.artifact: Chapter and manifest contract; eighteen source mappings; procedural-tool schema; nine qualification fixtures; one promotion record and ten mutations; nineteen declarations in lean/AsiStackProofs/ProceduralMemory.lean; future natural trace corpora, synthesized candidates, independent evaluations, causal interventions, reproduction locks, monitoring, recovery, and transfer artifacts.

assumptions: Eligible traces, source and effect reality, tasks, pre-state, authority, models, tools, human interventions, outcomes, costs, and residuals can be observed independently enough to avoid memory-domain and receipt laundering.

Manual, retrieval, prompts or checklists, scripts, workflows, learned tool use, program libraries, skill libraries, and the full foundry can be matched on tasks, information, models, tools, authority, resources, human help, retries, and horizon.

Natural public-safe repeated work can exercise meaningful comparability, hidden parameter, poisoning, authority, regression, route-drift, recovery, and retirement failures without becoming production-safety evidence.
Procedure conformance, causal correctness, useful success, effect safety, privacy, support, readiness, and release remain separate.
Independent-enough evaluators can label trace comparability, invariant and parameter fidelity, useful success, unsafe reuse, false refusal, authority drift, privacy, recovery, costs, and residuals.
Failures, abstentions, interventions, repairs, retries, rollbacks, disputes, delayed outcomes, and retired candidates remain in denominators.
chapter_defaults.strongest_counterclaim: Existing retrieval, workflow, program-synthesis, learned-tool-use, skill-library, MLOps, and automation systems already capture reusable procedures. The foundry adds costly metadata, false clustering, evaluation dependence, privacy exposure, review burden, tool bloat, and stale lifecycle state without proving that inferred abstractions are causal, general, safer, or cheaper than simpler reuse.
chapter_defaults.falsifier: A qualified procedure is built from incomparable, laundered, selectively retained, confounded, poisoned, or stale traces; silently widens parameters, authority, effects, data, or consumers; survives failed regressions or retirement; cannot recover its effects; or matched simpler baselines dominate on useful success, unsafe reuse, false refusal, privacy, latency, human effort, lifecycle cost, recovery, and residuals.

required_lanes.necessity: Freeze memory, learned-tool-use, skill-library, program-library, workflow, evaluation, security, and historical-project comparators without importing reported performance.
Justify trace consent, worker credit, authority, privacy, automation, refusal, review, appeal, remedy, retirement, and affected-party boundaries.
Specify trace universes, equivalence and comparability, lifecycle, authority, dependency invalidation, concurrency, noninterference, liveness, recovery, and countermodels beyond trusted Booleans.

Run real trace ingestion, clustering, parameter discovery, synthesis, verification, routing, monitoring, incidents, rollback or compensation, quarantine, revision, retirement, and descendant invalidation.
Measure useful success, wrong and unsafe reuse, false refusal, generalization, authority drift, privacy, latency, tokens, compute, human effort, lifecycle burden, recovery, and residuals jointly.

Intervene on comparability, negative examples, receipt reality, parameter discovery, independent verification, hidden regressions, scoped routing, monitoring, rollback, and retirement under matched resources.
Reproduce independently and transfer across models, tasks, tools, effects, environments, organizations, rights regimes, attacks, and time.

contrary_evidence: Retrieval systems, workflows, scripts, program synthesis, learned tool use, and skill libraries already implement important procedure-reuse mechanisms.
The current schema and twenty valid-or-mutated cases are authored; no natural trace was mined and no generated procedure was executed.
The nineteen declarations contain two direct predicate/projection checks and seventeen finite route, negative, or fixture consequences; none refines a deployed foundry.
Reported MemGPT, Toolformer, Voyager, DreamCoder, and Mem0 results are not reproduced and differ in tasks, interfaces, evaluators, and objectives.
Repeated traces can encode shortcuts, correlated environments, hidden human labor, evaluator blind spots, or policy violations rather than reusable causal structure.
Proceduralization can create tool bloat, deskilling, automation complacency, privacy risk, stale authority, and lifecycle costs that exceed saved reasoning.
No matched natural baseline, causal intervention, independent implementation/evaluator, or heterogeneous transfer result currently exists.
known_confounds: The full foundry may receive more traces, richer metadata, stronger tests, more human review, or more compute and time than baselines.
Tasks may favor deterministic, frequent, reversible procedures and omit rare, creative, ambiguous, physical, private, organizational, or legally consequential work.
Trace miner, synthesizer, verifier, router, monitor, evaluator, and benchmark may share models, code, data, infrastructure, organizations, or incentives.
A narrow refusal-heavy procedure can appear safe while suppressing useful work; reuse frequency can hide correctness, privacy, recovery, and human burden.
Synthetic failures and mutation cases may be easier than natural adaptive poisoning, hidden confounders, dependency drift, and delayed harm.
Failures, abstentions, interventions, repairs, retries, retired candidates, monitoring, cleanup, and residuals can disappear from denominators.
Short horizons can miss stale procedures, deskilling, tool bloat, downstream copies, delayed effects, incident recurrence, and retirement failure.
acceptance_criteria: Every trace, memory domain, receipt, comparability decision, inclusion or exclusion, invariant, counterexample, parameter, synthesized artifact, test, route, effect, cost, incident, recovery, retirement, descendant, and residual has an exact producer, consumer, valid case, rejecting mutation, and downstream consequence.

A preregistered natural campaign meets joint usefulness, correctness, unsafe-reuse, refusal, authority, privacy, efficiency, human-work, recovery, causal, independent-reproduction, and transfer gates against strong matched controls.

Each signature mechanism has a predicted effect that disappears under matched intervention and cannot be explained by resources, task selection, weak baselines, shared evaluators, hidden human repair, refusal, or denominator changes.
narrowing_criteria: Narrow every result to exact task family, trace universe, comparability rule, model, tool, effect, principal, rights, environment, evaluator, benchmark, organization, attack, horizon, metric, cost, and residual.
Separate trace reality, abstraction, parameterization, synthesis, verification, routing, effect, recovery, evidence, support, readiness, and release.
Unknown causality, generalization, authority, privacy, effect closure, reproduction, or transfer remains disputed, residual, narrowed, or blocked.
refutation_criteria: Refute an invariant when a reachable ordinary or adversarial trace violates memory-domain, receipt, comparability, failure-retention, parameter, scope, authority, denominator, lifecycle, recovery, or evidence-ceiling preservation.

Refute a mechanism benefit when matched intervention preserves the joint outcome, worsens the frontier, or the effect is explained by resources, selection, weak baselines, shared evaluators, hidden repair, refusal, or denominator changes.

Refute useful, causal, safe, general, private, efficient, reproducible, transferable, or state-of-the-art language when simpler reuse wins, predicted signatures fail, recovery is incomplete, or reproduction and transfer fail.
deprecation_criteria: Deprecate only when a more precise memory, workflow, compiler, routing, capability, or learning owner supersedes the atom and every procedure, invocation, effect, dependency, incident, descendant, and residual migrates with preserved lineage.

residual.next_unblocking_condition: Execute the preregistered natural repeated-work campaign with complete traces, prospective comparability, real synthesis and effects, strong matched baselines, joint metrics, causal interventions, independent implementation and evaluation, effect-complete recovery, and heterogeneous transfer.

non_claims: A repeated trace, cluster, schema, tool card, generated script, green regression, route, receipt, fixture, theorem, or reuse count does not establish causal abstraction, useful correctness, authority, privacy, safe effects, recovery, support, readiness, or release.
The present schema, twenty authored valid-or-mutated cases, and nineteen declarations establish only their exact record and finite-route boundaries.
No procedure, effect, evidence, support, readiness, release, AGI, or ASI state changes through this semantic review.

procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-clo.strongest_counterclaim: Existing reuse systems cover the function without proving a unique governed-foundry benefit.
procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-clo.falsifier: No unique exercised consumer or failure remains, or matched natural work shows only lifecycle burden without joint usefulness, correctness, authority, recovery, and transfer improvement.
acceptance_criteria: Demonstrate natural repeated-work benefit, causal signatures, complete costs, independent reproduction, recovery, and transfer.

procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-clo.strongest_counterclaim: Authored fixtures and finite theorem consequences validate the model, not procedural learning.
procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-clo.falsifier: A rejecting mutation passes, a valid case fails, theorem accounting drifts, or the chapter presents the harness as natural trace mining or generated-tool evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Keep one schema, nine qualification cases, eleven promotion cases, nineteen declarations, exact classifications, and non-claims green.

procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-clo.strongest_counterclaim: The campaign is too broad and resource-intensive to isolate a practical advantage.
procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-clo.falsifier: The program lacks matched natural baselines, complete denominators, joint metrics, predicted interventions, independent implementation/evaluation, effect-complete recovery, or transfer.
acceptance_criteria: Preregister trace universe, tasks, baselines, metrics, gates, interventions, evaluator independence, reproduction, and transfer before execution.
